# Gaapio - AI-Powered Technical Accounting Platform

> Gaapio is an AI-powered platform built by CPAs for CPAs that helps accounting teams create technical accounting memos, footnote disclosures, contract analysis, and compliance documentation faster and more accurately.

## Company Overview

Gaapio combines AI technology with deep accounting expertise to streamline technical accounting workflows. Built by former Big 4 CPAs with 15+ years of experience in technical accounting standards including ASC 606, ASC 842, and SOX compliance.

**Key Value Proposition:** Reduce technical accounting documentation time by up to 80% while maintaining audit-ready quality and compliance with GAAP standards.

**Target Users:** Controllers, CFOs, Technical Accounting Managers, CPA Firms, Audit Teams

## Products

### Accounting Memos
URL: /accounting-memos
AI-powered technical accounting memo generation with version history, reviewer comments, and exportable audit packages. Generate ASC 606, ASC 842, and other technical memos in minutes instead of hours.

### Footnote Disclosures
URL: /footnote-disclosures
AI-trained benchmarking and footnote requirement checklists with CPA-approved formatting. Ensure complete and compliant financial statement disclosures.

### Contract Analysis
URL: /contract-analysis
Automated lease abstraction, revenue contract analysis, and ASC 606/842 compliance evaluation. Extract key terms and identify accounting implications automatically.

### Accounting Research (ResearchGPT)
URL: /research-gpt
AI-powered research assistant with access to authoritative accounting guidance. Get answers to complex technical accounting questions with citations to ASC, SEC guidance, and Big 4 resources.

### Guidance Updates
URL: /guidance-updates
Real-time alerts for new accounting standards with implementation guidance. Stay current with FASB updates, SEC comment letter trends, and emerging issues.

### SOX Controls (Coming Soon)
URL: /sox-controls
SOX compliance documentation and control narrative generation. Streamline your internal control documentation and testing processes.

## Solutions by Organization Type

### Private Companies
URL: /solutions/private
Technical accounting and audit preparation for CFOs and Controllers at private companies. Simplified compliance without the complexity.

### Public Companies
URL: /solutions/public
SEC reporting, SOX compliance, and disclosure management for public filers. Meet regulatory requirements efficiently.

### Accounting Firms
URL: /solutions/firm
Multi-client workflows and advisory preparation for CPA firms. Scale your technical accounting services.

## Legal & Security

### Privacy Policy
URL: /privacy
Data protection and privacy practices. SOC 2 Type 2 certified.

### Terms of Service
URL: /terms-of-service
Service agreement and usage terms.

### Subscription Agreement
URL: /ssa
Detailed subscription service agreement.

### Security
Gaapio maintains SOC 2 Type 2 certification. Customer data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We do not use customer data to train AI models.

## Key Topics & Expertise

- Technical Accounting Memos
- ASC 606 Revenue Recognition
- ASC 842 Lease Accounting
- ASC 740 Income Taxes
- ASC 815 Derivatives and Hedging
- ASC 820 Fair Value Measurement
- ASC 350 Goodwill and Intangibles
- SOX Compliance and Controls
- SEC Reporting and Filings
- Footnote Disclosures
- CPA Audit Documentation
- Big 4 Accounting Standards
- FASB Guidance Updates
- Contract Analysis and Abstraction
- AI for Accountants and CPAs
